s: In 2019, Locke St. John suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.400, WHIP 1.650, SO 5, WAR 0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (TEX -> CHC).
In 2022, Locke St. John suited up for CHC as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 13.500, WHIP 1.500, SO 4, WAR -0.100. Notable context: Joined CHC.
